basicInfo.name: Nightmare Orly
basicInfo.flavor: Orly clashed with Yeonhee, whom she met while trying to stop the War of Destruction. As a result, she became able to wield all white magic. Afterwards, she founded the Night Crows with Teo, and worked to stop the Power of Destruction.

Normal Attack.desc:
2 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 70% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Paralysis. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 70% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Noble Meteor
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals Piercing damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Paralysis. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Lightstream
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 57% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - Each attack has a 100% chance to inflict Paralysis. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - 3 Allies
 - Grants Crit Rate Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Crit Damage Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 57% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: All-Seeing Light
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants All Damage Nullification. [Ends After: Taking 6 Hit(s)]
 - All Enemies
 - Inflicts Defense Reduction. [Always Active]
 - All Allies
 - Grants a Barrier equal to 25% of the caster's Magic Attack upon using a skill 1 time(s). [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]

profile.story:
Orly was born into a prestigious noble family, one with a long lineage of archmages.
She was prophesized to be the successor to the title of archmage, but as a child, Orly had little interest in magic.
Magic came to her as easily and naturally as breathing, so it didn't seem particularly exciting or worthy of attention.
Instead, Orly focused on subjects like business, mathematics, history, and life skills.
Her parents, confident in her talents, trusted her judgment and supported her desire to live freely without much interference.
However, after her first love and fiancé died from a plague, Orly began to take magic seriously.
If she truly was meant to become an archmage as foretold, and if she had properly learned magic, perhaps she could have saved him.
Even after enrolling in Magic Academy, she spent her days in regret.
Despite this, her innate talent flourished at the academy, and in just two years, she graduated with perfect scores.
Afterward, she joined the Magic Society and began making a name for herself. Yet, as her skills grew, so did the guilt of not being able to save the person who needed her most.
Ultimately, despite everyone's objections, she headed to Aisha.
She felt a sense of destiny calling her to the Moonlit Isles, which was embroiled in civil war at the time.
It was there that she met Teo.
From that moment on, Orly and Teo were inseparable.
Through the war on the Moonlit Isles, the War of Destruction, and even to the present day...
